title: Pine's Tornado Cleanup (PMW Compat)
description: Adds two simple items so far to make restoration and tornado protection a little easier and cheaper.
body:
This is a mod that adds a few features to help prepare, safeguard, and clean up the destructive tornadoes of ProtoManly's Weather mod. Downloading of the latter mod is optional but suggested because that mod is the entire reason this project exists. Note: the in game mod name is "easysaplings"

## **I am aware that the two strucures do not currently spawn in the world. I am currently working on a fix.**
